  - path: /etc/mysql/ca/ca.crt
    content: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
  volumes:
  - name: temp_volume
    path: /tmp
    update_policy: no_rollback_protection
- name: osvscan_image
  injection_files:
  - path: /etc/mysql/ca/ca.crt
    content: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
  - path: /etc/ca-challenge/challenge.crt
    content: $$SCONE::ca-challenge-cert$$
  - path: /etc/ca-challenge/challenge.key
    content: $$SCONE::ca-challenge-private-key$$
secrets:
- name: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MARIADB_CA_CERT
- name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
- name: ca-challenge-private-key
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/scone-osv-scan-ca-challenge
    secret: challenge-private-key
- name: ca-challenge-cert
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/scone-osv-scan-ca-challenge
    secret: challenge-cert
services:
- name: dbmanager
  image_name: dbmanager_image
  environment:
    DB_UPDATE_INTERVAL: 24h
    LOG_LEVEL: DEBUG
    MYSQL_CA_PATH: /etc/mysql/ca/ca.crt
    MYSQL_DATABASE: osv
    MYSQL_HOST: osv-scanner-sample-maxscale-service
    MYSQL_PORT: '3306'
    MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: $$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
    OSV_CA_CERT_PATH: /etc/ssl/certs/GTS_Root_R1.pem
    OSV_ECOSYSTEMS_LIST: https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=13pWY7NT2kRs9InHrzneB6lkR9thJyLxL
    OSV_HTTP_TIMEOUT: 10m
    SCONE_FSPF_UPDATE_POLICY: on-exit
    SCONE_SYNC_FSPF_TAG_WITH_CAS: '0'
  command: /bin/osvdbmanager
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
  attestation:
  - mrenclave:
    - 62781f9367cd093d114f6214c9be48992bd37c4f2d23a641310b1764e33a53cb
- name: osvscan
  image_name: osvscan_image
  environment:
    CA_CAS_ADDRESS: scone-cas.cf
    CA_CHALLENGE_CERT: /etc/ca-challenge/challenge.crt
    CA_CHALLENGE_KEY: /etc/ca-challenge/challenge.key
    CA_CHALLENGE_SESSION: osv-scanner-sample2/scone-osv-scan-ca-challenge
    CA_REQUEST_CERT_URL: https://scone-session-ca:8443/issue-certificate
    CA_VERIFY_SESSION: osv-scanner-sample2/scone-osv-scan
    LOG_LEVEL: DEBUG
    MYSQL_CA_PATH: /etc/mysql/ca/ca.crt
    MYSQL_DATABASE: osv
    MYSQL_HOST: osv-scanner-sample-maxscale-service
    MYSQL_PORT: '3306'
    MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: $$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
  command: /bin/osvscan
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
  attestation:
  - mrenclave:
    - 60d53cd75e98ce2ea70362f52009ddd5edb25be95bb4537d1d934002ed9161f5
volumes:
- name: temp_volume
access_policy:
  read:
  - ANY
  update:
  - CREATOR
security:
  attestation:
    mode: hardware
    tolerate:
    - debug-mode
    - hyperthreading
    - outdated-tcb
    - insecure-configuration
    - software-hardening-needed
    ignore_advisories: '*'
creator:
  signer: |
    -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
    MCowBQYDK2VwAyEAcKtAFLOMRitgqlXJgLRvctwmDlY+xowL6ed9nQDHbc8=
    -----END PUBLIC KEY-----
